headline: Assessing Zebra Technologies (ZBRA) Valuation After A Stretch Of Weak Share Price Performance
summary: Event context and recent stock performance Zebra Technologies (ZBRA) has been on investors’ radar after a recent stretch of weaker share performance, with the stock showing negative returns over the past month, past 3 months and year. See our latest analysis for Zebra Technologies. At a share price of US$203.62, Zebra Technologies has recorded a 19.1% decline in its 30 day share price return and a 29.8% fall in its 1 year total shareholder return. This suggests momentum has been fading as...
